items.name: Mellow Shoulder Pet
items.description: Mellow is a Small but powerful mafia leader in the world of Roblox. With a sleek white shirt a stylish fedora, and a gold chain collar, he exudes authority and charm. Despite his small size, his strategic mind and unwavering loyalty make him a formidable ally in any adventure."
